reviews.review_description: I bought this game yesterday. Honestly, it's very enjoyable. It's also fun to relax while watching videos. Unlike reality, I think it's nice that it can be done easily. Also, what I wish for is to add locations like jungles, summer mountains, and forests.
I have been playing this for 2 years. I love this game.

I’m not a gamer, I like meditation, the outdoor apps etc. Came across this one and thought I’d give it a try. Although I’ve only camped out a couple of times I thought this interactive app is great. exceptionally thought out and well crafted, try it, you won’t be disappointed. there is a YouTube camping VR video you can view that shows you how to pick up objects very easily, also, if the objects are too far away, you can press the a button to make objects closer. I have only been using VR for a couple of weeks total got this game yesterday and it’s amazing. I have high functioning, autism, and figured out so quickly how to use this game, so if I can, so can you.

This game is relaxing and a all you can ask for, in the future I want maps like a mountain side or a un snowy forest like in the summer or autumn or spring, I would also like full handtracking support but in other words, this game is amazing for a small price

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your support and I am very happy that you like this app. Indeed, Camping VR has a lot of room for imagination, and can create a lot of camping sites, more tools and gameplay, and even launch a multiplayer cooperation mode.

reviews.review_description: I just bought my first meta device the quest 3 and I'm loving it. I loved this, although I really wish there was more to experience including maybe summer camping too. Still it was so relaxing but I really can't wait for that beach one and space. Maybe an experience on a boat would be cool too. Just saying devs.🤔

developer_response.body: I'm glad you like this app and hope it brings you relaxation. Other maps are being produced. We will release the beach map soon. We hope you will like it and share it with your friends~

reviews.review_description: It’s a cool game it’s and with good graphics ITS AWESOME. Good job 😃😃😃 but we need a new update for the beach

developer_response.body: Thank you for your support and I'm sorry for the trouble. Are you still unable to reach anything while sitting? Regarding the height issue, we will update some height adjustment functions in subsequent versions. We hope that future updates can bring you a better experience. . . I wish you a happy life~

reviews.review_description: With better locomotion and more things to do, this would be worth paying for. Personally I would like to experience a vanlife-type setup.

developer_response.body: I'm very happy that you like it, and thank you for your suggestions. We will try more possibilities in the subsequent development. We look forward to the new map we will release soon: the beach map. I hope you can continue to like and support it!

reviews.review_description:
I suffer from a lot of anxiety and panic. Attacks I have to say your app has helped me a lot nice peaceful atmosphere well worth the money I look forward to the next update good work


The island update is superb this should be on the full store

developer_response.body: I am very happy that this app can bring you some relaxing and leisure time. Thank you very much for your recognition of this app. You can also share it with other people around you who need to relax. Finally, I hope you will feel better and better in the future.

reviews.review_description: I feel very grateful to the developers for this wonderful free experience. I recommend spending enough time in it to discover everything.

developer_response.body: We are very happy that you enjoyed the experience, this is our biggest motivation! I also hope you can recommend it to more people who like camping or need to relax. We will also launch new maps as soon as possible.

reviews.review_title: Beautiful graphic and immersed in nature
reviews.review_description: I really liked the app; the graphics are amazing, and it really feels like being in nature at a campsite. However, I think the experience is too short, and it would be great to add more activities. When will new camping spots be released? So far, it's one of the best apps I've seen

developer_response.body: Thank you for your recognition and expectations. We are glad that you enjoy this app and hope that we will have the opportunity to update the map in the future.

reviews.review_description:
I genuinely like what the dev did here. 

Despite it being more of a meditation/relaxation app, the dev added a ton of cool mechanics to keep it interesting.

For what it is, it's a very cool app.

A couple things I'd like to see added:

-Free movement around your campsite
-the binoculars. Kinda freaked me out for a second when I looked through them and my face was pressed up against a picture of the sun. maybe add some birds that you can look at using the binoculars.
-a cooler that contains your food.
- water dispenser
-storage container with your cooking utensils 
-bundle of logs that you can use to build a camp fire at a fire pit. (Ability to cook hotdogs, make s'mores, burn sticks etc.)

Just to name a few. Either way, this is a really cool app and I'd recommend it to anyone who enjoys camping or is looking for a relaxation app


Last note: 

I know the premise is to be a relaxation app, BUT the mechanics are solid and I can see this having potential of being a cool PvE game. Nothing crazy like Green Hell, but somewhere in between where they add some basic PvE elements like hunger, thirst, ensuring your food is cooked, and some additional basic tasks that you'd find yourself do while camping. While I'm sure that's a little far fetched, it could be cool

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your support, affirmation, and such detailed and thoughtful suggestions, it is very helpful to us! We are sorry that due to some reasons, the development progress of this game has been affected. Next, we will speed up the development progress so that other maps can meet you as soon as possible. We will add more interesting gameplay and creativity on the basis of ensuring that the overall tone is consistent. We think its imagination is infinite... Finally, I wish you a happy life and hope to continue to support us!

reviews.review_description:
This app feels so realistic to me and the environments are stunning 😍 

Please.. Please... create more environments to hang out.  A Fall environment would be great, as Fall is the most popular season for camping.

Can you also create a teleport feature where we can move around in the tent.  Great job developers..

QUESTION TO APP DEVOPERS:

Would it be possible to create a height adjustment?  I've tried to use this app as I was sitting up in my bed, however, I couldn't reach for anything because I was sitting too far up.  Thanks!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your support and patient reply. We have received your suggestions and we will fix this problem in subsequent updates. Because some other projects are advancing at the same time, the progress of this project will be somewhat affected. We will speed up the development progress and update other maps as soon as possible. We are sorry to keep you waiting...

reviews.review_description: It was an excellent game, but there was just one level to play. If it was a little bit longer, I think it would be better. Also all you’re doing is really cooking and that’s really it. It would be fun if we could go on like little hikes through the wilderness or do other things, otherwise it was a pretty good game. I would totally recommend.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your patient reply and suggestions, it is indeed very helpful to us. At the beginning of the game production, we considered many possibilities for the gameplay, but in the end, after weighing the performance, as well as our funds and other constraints, we chose a fixed-point game mode. We used limited resources to try our best to make the fixed-point The surrounding environment is as detailed as possible, which may indeed be a pity. So we will try to add more possible gameplay in subsequent maps. The beach map will have a lot of breakthroughs. We will release the beach map soon. We hope you will continue to pay attention and continue to support us!

reviews.review_description: The virtual guitar and the binocular were amazing to play with. They felt very engaging and contributed to the mood and the atmosphere of the experience in a great way

developer_response.body: We are very happy that you enjoy this application. This is a great encouragement to us. We will release the beach map soon. We are trying to add more gameplay. We hope you can continue to pay attention and continue to support us~

reviews.review_description: I had just finished playing elden ring on my ps5 and was very angry. Saw this and decided to play it and I was at peace until my headset died (yes I sat in a virtual campsite for 8 hours leave me alone) the game looks amazing and the visuals in general make me feel like I just finished meditating. Amazing job and I personally cannot wait for the new environments

developer_response.body: It's nice, it gives you peace of mind and then I marvel that you stayed in it for so long, it's incredible. We are already stepping up the development of other maps. We will release the beach map soon. Please continue to support us and share it with your friends...

reviews.review_description: This is one of the best experiences I have had in vr AND its free!? Honestly just get it its amazing

developer_response.body: We are very happy that you like this app. We will continue to work hard to speed up the development progress and will release the beach map in the near future. We hope you can continue to support us! ~

reviews.review_title: This game Is so good but...
reviews.review_description: the game is beautiful but it has a problem that ruins the experience the last part of the mountain where you have to make coffee I can't get the kettle same thing on the beach in the second "level" I can't get the ax to cut wood please sort this out

developer_response.body: Thank you for your support and sorry for the trouble. From your description, it may be a problem with the ground height positioning of the device. Make sure the ground height in the app matches the real world. If you still can't pick up low objects, you can also try pressing the A button on the right handle to switch the height. I hope this can solve the problem you encountered. Best wishes~

reviews.review_description: I love camping and this is epic and looks stunning I cannot wait for the other locations. I am more than happy to pay for this quality of work done here.

developer_response.body: I'm really happy that you like this app, other maps are already in the works, and the beach map is in the final stages. I can't wait for it to come to you, and I hope you will continue to enjoy it!

reviews.review_description: Can’t wait to play the next updates I love to play this when I first wake up and watch the scenery

developer_response.body: We are very happy that you like this app. We are polishing the second beach map and we can’t wait for it to meet you soon. We hope you will like it and continue to follow us~

reviews.review_description: Its so realxing so good try it for your self

developer_response.body: We are happy to receive your affirmation and support. Our goal is to make camping easy for everyone.
